test-method.name: testBreadcrumbAndSidebar
test-method.description: TC06 - Check breadcrumb and left side menu

exception.message: Expected no products when searching 'Apple' in 'Components' without subcategories expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected no products when searching 'Apple' in 'Components' without subcategories expected [true] but found [false] at
